title: Agent Control Specification verdict (AGT D1/D2)
description: Policy output normalized by the Rust core into a Verdict. AGT D1 replaces the upstream effects[] array with the transform decision; AGT D2 adds the optional evidence object.

reason.description: Policy supplied reason. The runtime_error prefix is reserved for core failures.

transform.description: AGT D1.1: present only when decision == transform; the runtime applies it to the policy target in enforce mode and validates it in evaluate_only mode.

evidence.description: AGT D2: optional opaque evidence object carried by high-assurance dispatchers (SMT-verified gates, mechanised-proof PDPs, TEE-attested PDPs). The runtime treats it as opaque and propagates it to telemetry per AGT-EVIDENCE-1.0 §3.

result_labels.description: Policy supplied information-flow labels for the data produced at this sink. The core returns them verbatim; the host persists them with the produced data and re-supplies them as input.ifc.source_labels (AGT-SNAPSHOT §2.2) on later evaluations. The core stores and propagates nothing.

allOf.description: AGT D1.1: transform body is REQUIRED iff decision == transform.

else.description: Transform body is FORBIDDEN on non-transform decisions.

allOf.description: AGT D1: the legacy effects[] member on the verdict is REJECTED. Even an explicit null or empty array fails closed because the key MUST NOT appear.

path.description: Path rooted at $policy_target. Other roots fail closed with runtime_error:transform_target_forbidden.

artefact.description: Content address or URI of an offline-verifiable proof. SHOULD be sha256:<lowercase-hex> or a URI.

verification_pointers.description: Map of short identifiers (e.g. issuer_pubkey, policy_registry, attestation_endpoint) to URIs an auditor MAY consult.
